hooks.command: FILE=$(echo $TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // .file_paths[0] // empty'); if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.mjs|*.json|*.css|*.md|*.mdx) npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || exit 2;; esac
FILES=$(git diff --name-only --diff-filter=d HEAD -- '*.ts' '*.tsx' '*.js' '*.jsx' '*.mjs'); if [ -z "$FILES" ]; then exit 0; fi; npx eslint --max-warnings=0 $FILES 2>&1 || exit 2
